titleStmt.title: SII 34.420: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 420. Paḷḷimaḍam, hamlet of Tiruchchuḻi, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the south base of the Kālanāthasvāmi temple.

summary.p: This records gift of 75 sheep for a lamp to the Bhaṭārar of the temple of Sundara-paṇḍya-Īśvaram at Tiruchchuḻiyal Paḷḷimaḍai a dēvadāna in Parittikkuḍi-nāḍu by Chōḻāntaka-Pallavaraiyaṉ alias Māṟaṉ Ādichchaṉ of Pōḻiyūr in Pōḻiyūr-nāḍu. The sheep were entrusted to Chāttaṉ Dēvaṉ a kuḍi and paḍaittalaivaṉ of Kīraṉūr in Teṉpula-nāḍu. Paṭaraṉ Chōlai, the kāviti of Pōḻiyūr stood surety (puṇai) for the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cOḻaṉṟalai koṇṭa kO vīrapāṇṭiyaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Itaṉetir mūṉṟu Ivvāṇṭu parittikku
ṭināṭṭu tēvatāṉan tiruccuḻiyal paḷḷimaṭai cuntarapāṇṭiya Īśvarattu
paṭārarkkup pōḻiyūrnāṭṭup pōḻiyūrc cōḷāntakap pallavaraiyaṉā
yiṉa māṟaṉāticcaṉ vaitta tiruṉontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Iravum pakalumuṭṭāmē
Erivatāka cōḷāntaka nārāyattiṉ kīḻ Uḻakkiṉāl ney Uḻakkāḻākku Inney
kku cāvāmūvāp pērāṭāka Aṭutta Āṭu Eḻupattaiñcu Ivai koṇṭu Aṭṭuvāṉāyi
ṉāṉ teṉpula nāṭṭu kīraṉūrkkuṭi paṭaittalaivaṉ cāttaṉ tēvaṉ, Ivaṉukkup puṇai
pōḻiyūrnāṭṭup pōḻiyūrk kāviti paṭāraṉ cōlai, Iviḷakku rakṣippār tiruccu
ḻiyal Ayyaṉmār
Digital edition of SII 34.420 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
